name: BB:FalsePositive: Network Management Server Recon
notes: Edit this BB to define all the false positive categories that occur to or from network management servers that are defined in the BB:HostDefinition: Network Management Servers building block.
bb_references: BB:FalsePositive: Network Management Server Recon on events which are detected by the undefined system
conditions_text: when we see an event match any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Network Management Servers
where the Event Category for the event is one of the following Recon, Suspicious
TD_list: APPLY BB:FalsePositive: Network Management Server Recon on events which are detected by the undefined system
AND when we see an event match any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Network Management Servers
AND where the Event Category for the event is one of the following Recon, Suspicious
